text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I burst right through the spring hurdle!<n>Hi-yah! Call
me<n>Matikan-enter-the-dragon!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Were you watching, Trainer? Fortune<n>smiled on
me from the heavens!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Thank you! With a race as importantas this, I gave it my all—is what Iwould say if the gods hadn'talready done the hard work for me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now it's time to see what fate has to<n>say about
my next race! Not that it<n>should be much of a
surprise.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the first stage of the<n>Classics, so it's
pretty obvious... But<n>anyway, let's start up those
divinations!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna snatch a fortune slip quick<n>this time. I
wonder what it'll be...<n>Drumroll, please!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What in the what?! The Japanese<n>Derby?!
Whazzat now?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Am I really supposed to just skip the<n>Satsuki Sho
and dive straight into the<n>Derby?! O gods,
enlighten me!
choice_data_list: This might be a challenge sent by the heavens.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A challenge... Yes, that must be it. The<n>race that
every Umamusume dreams<n>of—the very pinnacle
of the Classics...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Fine. If this is my destiny, I'll accept it<n>with open
arms! Can I ask for your<n>assistance?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thank yooouuu! If you're with me, I<n>can at least
try.

Now let's hurry and buy up some<n>lucky charms to
commemorate my<n>new destiny. Ooh, and I can get
them<n>to stamp my shrine passport while<n>we're
there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: O-of course I'm going to train too. I'msure you're aware that my effortswon't do much to change things...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But fret not... That doesn't mean I<n>won't put all
my strength into this.<n>After all, the Derby is a big
deal.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I shan't mar that sunny day! I'd like<n>to hang a
fortune right from one of<n>Fuchu's giant zelkova
trees while in<n>good spirits!
